model.text: This form grants broad authority to another adult, called your attorney-in-fact (Agent), to act on your behalf in a wide range of matters. This may include managing your finances, real estate, personal property, and engaging in various business transactions. If you have any questions about these powers, obtain competent legal advice.

model.error: This field must contain a valid e-mail address.
This field must contain a valid e-mail address.

options.value: I do hereby ratify and agree to ratify all actions by my agent, which are performed in terms of the authority conferred upon him by this General Power of Attorney
